title: vignea × ludibunda
intro: Vignea × ludibunda is a hybrid plant, also known as Garden Hops or Yellow Hops, which is a cross between Vitis labrusca and Vitis riparia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Vignea × ludibunda typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
